promotion_rules.ceiling_promotion_screen_pass: mean delta vs all-base iter34 5-fold >= +0.025, seed std < 0.020, and P2 point/bootstrap one-sided pass
promotion_rules.robustification_screen_pass: mean delta vs all-base iter34 5-fold >= -0.010, mean CCC >= 0.700, and P2 point/bootstrap one-sided pass
promotion_rules.scope: screen only; any passing candidate still needs fresh pre-registration before LOOCV
